cards.name: Mysterious Fossil
cards.text: Play Mysterious Fossil as if it were a Basic Pokémon. While in play, Mysterious Fossil counts as a Colorless Pokémon (as well as a Trainer card). Can't retreat or be affected by Special Conditions. If Knocked Out, doesn't count as a Knocked Out Pokémon.

tests.name: mysterious_fossil_basic_pokemon
tests.description: Test that Mysterious Fossil can be played as Basic Pokemon
